w:r.w:t: Before starting, please make sure you have completed the preparations.
If you have not installed Android Studio, please visit the Android official website to download and install
Create a new project in Android studio
Create a libs folder under the project app file and put the jar package we provide into it.

wp:docPr.name: 图片 1
wp:docPr.descr:
图形用户界面, 应用程序
描述已自动生成

pic:cNvPr.name: 图片 1
pic:cNvPr.descr:
图形用户界面, 应用程序
描述已自动生成

w:r.w:t: Then right-click hsznBluetooth.jar and select add as library, as shown below

wp:docPr.name: 图片 3
wp:docPr.descr:
图形用户界面, 文本, 应用程序
描述已自动生成

pic:cNvPr.name: 图片 3
pic:cNvPr.descr:
图形用户界面, 文本, 应用程序
描述已自动生成

w:r.w:t: In the AndroidManifest.xml file of the app, add the tag code
以后搜索蓝牙需要定位权限，请手动代码请求权限Special instructions, if searching for Bluetooth after android 6.0 requires positioning permission, please request the permission manually
You need to initialize the sdk in the application to ensure that the function can be used normally. code show as below：
Register monitor the Bluetooth connection status
Register monitor the Bluetooth switch status
Returned error code Error message comparison table
The machine ID number has been set and cannot be set repeatedly
The receiving buffer is full, do not continue to send data
The frame sequence number is wrong
The received file length is inconsistent with the file size
The receiving buffer is full, please wait until the buffer is empty and resend this frame (send read status frame query buffer)
The previous file did not end the cutting.
Mode is wrong, server password can only be set in AP mode.
